banner.title: Anonymous telemetry is on
banner.body: RelayRoom sends anonymous, content-free usage statistics by default so we can improve it. We never send the content of your code, messages, or names. You can share a bit more, keep it anonymous, or turn it off.
banner.optedIn: Thanks! Community telemetry is on (anonymous stats + an install id).
banner.optedAnonymous: Got it. Anonymous, content-free telemetry stays on.
banner.optedOut: Got it. Nothing will be sent.
banner.error: We could not save your choice.

community.label: Community
community.description: Anonymous aggregate stats plus a stable install id, so we can de-dupe and follow up. Still content-free.

anonymous.label: Anonymous (default)
anonymous.description: Content-free aggregate with no install id. On by default.

off.label: Off
off.description: Send nothing. RelayRoom keeps working exactly the same.

settings.cardDescription: This instance sends anonymous, content-free usage statistics by default. Share a bit more (community, adds an install id), keep it anonymous, or turn it off. The choice never affects how RelayRoom works.
settings.title: Telemetry mode
settings.hint: We only ever send anonymous aggregate counts and buckets - never the content of your code, messages, prompts, responses, names, or token values.
settings.error: We could not save the telemetry setting.

data.title: What gets sent
data.intro: By default RelayRoom sends a small anonymous beacon about once a day - content-free and with no install id. Community mode adds a stable install id (for de-dupe and follow-up); off sends nothing. It contains only the items below - never any content.

collected.title: What we collect
collected.description: Anonymous aggregate values, version, and bucketed counts only.

version.label: RelayRoom version
version.detail: The version string of this install, so we know which releases are in use.

edition.label: Edition
edition.detail: Which build edition this instance is running (for example, community).

os.label: Operating system
os.detail: The host platform family (for example linux, darwin, win32).

uptimeBucket.label: Uptime bucket
uptimeBucket.detail: A coarse range such as <1h, 1-24h, 1-7d, or 7d+ - never an exact uptime.

scaleBucket.label: Scale buckets
scaleBucket.detail: Coarse ranges for how many projects, agents, and members exist - never exact counts.

messageCountBucket.label: Message count bucket
messageCountBucket.detail: A coarse range for how many messages flowed - never message contents.

tokenBucket.label: Token in/out buckets
tokenBucket.detail: Coarse ranges for input and output token volume - never the tokens or their text.

providerFamily.label: Model provider family
providerFamily.detail: Only the family: claude, codex, agy, or other. Never the specific model, account, or key.

wakeLoopCount.label: Wake loop count
wakeLoopCount.detail: A bucketed count of wake-loop occurrences, to catch runaway loops.

never.title: What we never collect
never.description: Content is never collected. Not now, not ever.

items.names: User, agent, project, or organization names
items.tokenValues: Token values, secrets, or connect codes

optOut.title: How to opt out
optOut.body: You can turn telemetry off at any time. Once off, nothing is transmitted - RelayRoom keeps working exactly the same.
